name: FlexRayRcvV6StartCycle
title: FlexRayRcvV6StartCycle
syntax: FlexRayRcvV6StartCycle(long msgTime, byte nmlen, byte nmdata[])
description: A function defined in CAPL with this signature receives all FlexRay StartCycle events.The event is generated at the beginning of a communication cycle.It contains the NM vector that is valid for this round.

parameters.name: msgTime
parameters.description: Time stamp of the FlexRay frame.
